---
title: "orbital + Snowflake: predictions in place"
format:
  revealjs:
    include-after-body:
      - js/orbital-inplace.html
---

```{=html}
<!-- Configure per-deck labels/colours here. -->
<script>
  window.ORB_MODEL_LABEL = 'workflow()';   // R: workflow()  |  Python: Pipeline
  window.ORB_SNOWFLAKE   = '#29B5E8';       // Snowflake brand blue
  window.ORB_RSESSION    = '#276DC3';       // R blue
</script>
```

## {.orb-slide}

::: {.orb-stage-wrap}
<div id="orb-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-compile"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-embed"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-run"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-newdata"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-newpred"}

<!-- Stages (one fragment marker each):
     stage 0: arrival — R session (left) + Snowflake table (right)   [DONE]
     stage 1: orbital() compiles the model into a SELECT ... AS .pred SQL chip  [DONE]
     stage 2: the SQL chip travels into Snowflake and docks over the table  [DONE]
     stage 3: query runs in place, .pred fills, R session no longer needed  [DONE]
     stage 4: table scrolls down to reveal a fresh batch of (unscored) rows
     stage 5: the same standing query scores them in place too (no round-trip) -->
